mapper.select: SELECT p.post_id, p.board_type, p.dept_id, d.dept_name, p.title, p.content, p.created_by, p.view_count, p.is_pinned, p.attachments, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM platform_v3.bd_post p LEFT JOIN platform_v3.org_department d ON p.dept_id = d.dept_id WHERE p.post_id = #{postId} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE platform_v3.bd_post SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE post_id = #{postId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO platform_v3.bd_post (board_type, dept_id, title, content, created_by, is_pinned, attachments, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{boardType}, #{deptId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{createdBy}, COALESCE(#{isPinned}, 'N'), #{attachments}::jsonb, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE platform_v3.bd_post SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, is_pinned = COALESCE(#{isPinned}, is_pinned), attachments = COALESCE(#{attachments}::jsonb, attachments), updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT comment_id, post_id, parent_id, content, author_no, author_name, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM platform_v3.bd_comment WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND deleted = FALSE ORDER BY COALESCE(parent_id, comment_id), parent_id NULLS FIRST, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO platform_v3.bd_comment (post_id, parent_id, content, author_no, author_name, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{postId}, #{parentId}, #{content}, #{authorNo}, #{authorName}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM platform_v3.bd_comment WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND deleted = FALSE
SELECT attach_id, post_id, object_key, filename, size_bytes, mime_type, uploader_no, uploaded_at FROM platform_v3.bd_attachment WHERE post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY uploaded_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO platform_v3.bd_attachment (post_id, object_key, filename, size_bytes, mime_type, uploader_no) VALUES (#{postId}, #{objectKey}, #{filename}, #{sizeBytes}, #{mimeType}, #{uploaderNo})
